channel.title: Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Very Important People on Dropout.tv

item.title: Last Looks: Stop
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Caitlin Reilly became Stop.

Duration: 05:25

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, caitlin reilly, tamar levine, alex perrone, alisha silverstein, paul robalino, behind the scenes

item.title: Stop
item.description:
Vic interviews performance artist Stop (Caitlin Reilly) and discusses her new art pieces.

Duration: 19:41

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, caitlin reilly

item.title: Last Looks: Lil Huffy
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Frankie Quiñones became Lil Huffy.

Duration: 05:40

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, frankie quiñones, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, alisha silverstein, paul robalino, behind the scenes

item.title: Lil Huffy
item.description:
Vic interviews musician Lil Huffy (Frankie Quiñones) and gets a lesson in rapping.

Duration: 14:14

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, frankie quiñones
